options.name: --fhir-version
options.description: FHIR version of the input

options.name: --sourceType
options.description: Kind of source FSI will use to import resources

options.name: --source
options.description: Input directory for work (this directory is visited recursively including all the subdirectories)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Limit the number of resources to import. Use this for testing your setup.

options.name: --update-existing-resources
options.description: When true, a resource is updated in the database if it already exists and a history record is created. Otherwise, an existing resource gets skipped.

options.name: --license
options.description: Firely Server license file

options.name: --dbType
options.description: Specifies the target database type

options.name: --settings
options.description: Specifies the path of a custom settings json file

options.name: --readBuffer
options.description: Number of resources to buffer after reading.

options.name: --metaPar
options.description: Number of threads to assign metadata.

options.name: --metaBuffer
options.description: Number of resources to buffer for assigning metadata.

options.name: --typePar
options.description: Number of threads to add type information.

options.name: --typeBuffer
options.description: Number of resources to buffer for adding type information.

options.name: --absRelPar
options.description: Number of threads when converting absolute to relative references.

options.name: --absRelBuffer
options.description: Number of resources to buffer when converting absolute to relative references.

options.name: --indexPar
options.description: Number of threads to index the search parameters. This is typically the most resource intensive step and should have the most threads.

options.name: --indexBuffer
options.description: Number of resources to buffer for indexing the search parameters.

options.name: --haltOnError
options.description: When true, stop application on single error.

options.name: --useRecoveryJournal
options.description: A directory containing the recovery journal.

options.name: --urlConvBases
options.description: Base endpoints for which conversion should be performed.

options.name: --urlConvElems
options.description: FhirPaths identifying URLs elements that should be converted from absolute to relative URLs.

options.name: --extraParameters
options.description: Internal - side-load additional search parameters from a json file

options.name: --provisionTargetDatabase
options.description: Provision the target database

options.name: --mongoCollection
options.description: Collection name for entries

options.name: --mongoConnectionstring
options.description: Connection string to Firely Server MongoDb database

options.name: --mongoPar
options.description: The # of batches to save in parallel. Depends on your bandwidth to MongoDb and its processing power.

options.name: --mongoExistQryPar
options.description: The number of parallel threads querying the DB to check whether a resource exists (only when --update-existing-resources is set to false).

options.name: --mongoBatch
options.description: The # of resources to save in each batch.

options.name: --connectionstring
options.description: Connection string to Firely Server SQL Server database

options.name: --sqlPar
options.description: The # of batches to save in parallel. Depends on your bandwidth to SQL Server and its processing power.

options.name: --sqlExistQryPar
options.description: The number of parallel threads querying the DB to check whether a resource exists (only when --update-existing-resources is set to false).

options.name: --sqlBatch
options.description: The # of resources to save in each batch. SQL Server must be able to process it within the CommandTimeout.

options.name: --sqlTimeout
options.description: The time SQL Server is allowed to process a batch of resources.

options.name: --mongoV2ConnectionResources
options.description: Connection string to Firely Server MongoDb database for resources

options.name: --mongoV2ConnectionFhirIndex
options.description: Connection string to Firely Server MongoDb database for the search index

options.name: --mongoV2Par
options.description: The # of batches to save in parallel. Depends on your bandwidth to MongoDb and its processing power.

options.name: --mongoV2ExistQryPar
options.description: The number of parallel threads querying the DB to check whether a resource exists (only when --update-existing-resources is set to false).

options.name: --mongoV2Batch
options.description: The # of resources to save in each batch.

options.name: --srcMongoConnectionString
options.description: Connection string to read resources from

options.name: --srcMongoCollection
options.description: Collection name to read entries from

options.name: --srcMongoRunningMode
options.description: The mode in which application should run

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
